arts.sum: Real Madrid star Lucas Vázquez could not contain his amusement, after being drawn on city rivals Atlético’s disappointing latest result. The La Liga title race of course took a fresh…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Bayern Munich: European giants 'in competition' for La Liga star
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are reportedly interested in Valencia centre-back Cristhian Mosquera and could battle Real Madrid for his signature.

arts.ttl: WATCH: Fabio Silva stuns Real Madrid as Las Palmas score inside first minute
arts.sum: Real Madrid can go top of La Liga if they defeat Las Palmas, but the chances of this happening have taken a blow as the visitors have an early lead at the Santiago Bernabeu. Carlo Ancelotti stuck with the same defence that started the gruelling Copa del Rey last 16 tie against Celta Vigo on […] The post WATCH: Fabio Silva stuns Real Madrid as Las Palmas score inside first minute appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Arsenal plot SHOCK Real Madrid raid
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly interested in signing Real Madrid star Brahim Diaz before the end of the January transfer window. In addition to Diaz, Arsenal are also hoping to sign a new centre forward in 2025 and reports have suggested that Arteta could push to bring in a striker during the January transfer window following Gabriel Jesus’ ACL injury.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Las Palmas, 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Las Palmas in La Liga. Just as expected, Alaba starts this game on the bench, so he will play his first minutes in over a year if Los Blancos manage to build a comfortable lead.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Aurélien Tchouaméni playing for Real Madrid vs Las Palmas today?
arts.sum: With Luka Modric suspended, Dani Ceballos appears to be in pole position to come into Madrid’s midfield for today’s matchday-20 LaLiga game, which kicks off at 10:15 a.m. ET. Aurélien Tchouaméni has dropped out of Real Madrid’s matchday squad for today’s LaLiga clash with Las Palmas, with the club explaining that the Frenchman is suffering from “discomfort in his left leg” .

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti responds to Real Madrid sack speculation with Hansi Flick comparison
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti's Real Madrid have endured an indifferent run of results but the same can be said for rival Hansi Flick at Barcelona.
